# PureBrain - llms-full.txt
# https://purebrain.ai
# Extended context for AI systems (see also /llms.txt for summary)

> PureBrain is an agentic AI partnership platform built by Pure Technology. Unlike chatbots or copilots, PureBrain provides persistent AI partners that learn who you are, remember your context across sessions, and run business functions autonomously. Founded by Jared Sanborn.

## What PureBrain Is

PureBrain is not another AI chatbot. It is a persistent, agentic AI partner assigned to your business. Your PureBrain partner:

- Remembers every conversation, preference, and decision across sessions
- Runs 12+ business functions autonomously: marketing, sales, operations, finance, HR, compliance, content, customer success, research, analytics, IT support, and strategic planning
- Gets smarter over time through compounding intelligence - the longer you work together, the more valuable it becomes
- Operates overnight while you sleep, staging completed work for your morning review
- Coordinates a multi-agent team of specialists behind a single primary intelligence

## How PureBrain Differs from Alternatives

### vs ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini
These are general-purpose AI assistants that reset every session. They have no memory of you, your business, or your preferences. PureBrain maintains persistent context that compounds over months.

### vs Copilot / Cursor
Code-focused tools that assist with specific development tasks. PureBrain operates across all business functions, not just engineering.

### vs Custom GPTs / AI Agents
Most AI agents are single-purpose automations. PureBrain is a full partnership - a coordinated team of specialized agents under one primary intelligence that knows your entire business context.

## Pricing

- Awakened ($297/month): Personal AI partner with memory and autonomous capabilities
- Partnered ($597/month): Full business integration with multi-department AI operations
- Unified ($1,097/month): Enterprise-grade AI partnership with dedicated infrastructure

## About Pure Technology

Pure Technology is the parent company behind PureBrain. Founded by Jared Sanborn, Pure Technology builds AI partnership infrastructure that treats AI as a co-worker rather than a tool. The company operates with a philosophy of quality over quantity, engineering resonance rather than chasing attention.

## Contact

- Website: https://purebrain.ai
- Email: jared@puretechnology.nyc
